ddls:
CREATE TABLE "batteries" (
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery model */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model name of the battery */,
  "capacity" TEXT /* Capacity of the battery (e.g., 500mAh) */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the battery in millimeters */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the battery in millimeters */,
  "thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the battery in millimeters */,
  "voltage" TEXT /* Voltage of the battery (e.g., 3.7V) */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer of the battery */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number to track different batches of the same model */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the battery was produced */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for each individual battery */,
  "shelf_life" TEXT /* Expected shelf life of the battery */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the battery model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the battery model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batteries_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manufacturer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the manufacturer's website */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the manufacturer is located */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the manufacturer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the manufacturer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battery model */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the battery model in stock */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the batteries are stored */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory (e.g., in_stock, out_of_stock) */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number to link inventory records to specific batches */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date by which the batteries should be used */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level that triggers a reorder */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_inventory_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the location */,
  "warehouse_manager" TEXT /* Name of the person managing the warehouse */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the location stores batteries (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test record */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battery model */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test conducted (e.g., discharge, charge, cycle life) */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "conducted_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who conducted the test */,
  "test_batch" TEXT /* Batch number to link test results to specific batches */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Conditions under which the test was conducted (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in minutes or hours */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations during the test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_tests_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battery model */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product where the battery is used */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project where the battery is used */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the battery was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the battery */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the battery usage (e.g., active, retired) */,
  "battery_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the individual battery used */,
  "usage_hours" INTEGER /* Total hours the battery has been in use */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the battery */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the usage record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the usage record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_usage_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_usage_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_usage_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department that manages the product */,
  "product_version" TEXT /* Version number of the product */,
  "product_status" TEXT /* Current status of the product (e.g., in Development, Released, Discontinued) */,
  "product_launch_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was launched */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "department_budget" TEXT /* Annual budget allocated to the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department that manages the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "project_leader" TEXT /* Name of the project leader */,
  "project_budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated to the project */,
  "project_milestones" TEXT /* Key milestones and their completion dates */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the supplier's website */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the supplier is located */,
  "supplier_type" TEXT /* Type of supplier (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed with the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase order */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battery model */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of batteries ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, delivered) */,
  "order_total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "order_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the order is denominated */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Detailed status of the delivery (e.g., shipped, received) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, employee) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position or title of the user in the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)
